steps.title: Use the defenders' reply
steps.content: Purists call female-centered retellings a modern imposition. Defenders answer that adapting myths for new cultural contexts is almost as old as the myths themselves.

steps.title: Draw the limited conclusion
steps.content: That reply supports the idea that foregrounding female perspectives is not a newly loose attitude toward mythic fidelity. B overstates a long tradition of female-focused versions, C contradicts the reply, and D adds an unstated motive. The answer is A.
